summary: Implemented M2 content compiler guards for bad maps and bad references. The compiler now rejects M2 displayNameKey/sourceId mismatches, malformed or zero-area polygons, district anchors outside their polygons, settlement anchors outside their owning district polygons, and disconnected district route graphs with structured codes and paths. Added a validation-only bad-fixture manifest marked FICTIONAL/LOW/M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 and expanded schema/compiler tests while preserving the valid M2 fixture manifest hash.

tests_run.result: Modified implementation/test files for this task plus pre-existing coordination state changes in project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/M2-CONTENT-GUARDS-001.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, and untracked lead route message.
Pre-implementation red test failed as expected: invalid M2 provenance paths were reported as sourceCategory/confidence/policyId instead of provenance.*.
Pre-implementation red tests failed as expected for missing M2 district anchor, settlement anchor, disconnected route graph, and localization-key guards.
Default content validation passed: m1.abstract-graph-30 nodes=30 edges=60 manifestHash=4a438525.

tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['project/tasks/active/M2-CONTENT-GUARDS-001.json','content-source/m2-fixtures/validation-only-bad-fixtures.manifest.json']; for (const f of files) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8')); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(files[1],'utf8')); if (manifest.kind!=='m2.validation-only-bad-fixture-manifest') throw new Error('bad manifest kind'); if (manifest.historicity!=='FICTIONAL') throw new Error('bad historicity'); if (manifest.provenance?.sourceCategory!=='validation-only-fixture'||manifest.provenance?.confidence!=='LOW'||manifest.provenance?.policyId!=='M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001') throw new Error('bad provenance'); if (!Array.isArray(manifest.scopeNotes)||!manifest.scopeNotes.join(' ').includes('Not production content')) throw new Error('bad scope notes'); if (!Array.isArray(manifest.cases)||manifest.cases.length<5) throw new Error('bad cases'); for (const c of manifest.cases) { if (!c.caseId||!['bad-map','bad-reference'].includes(c.category)||c.sourceFixture!=='prototype-world-30-districts.json'||!Array.isArray(c.expectedErrorCodes)||!Array.isArray(c.expectedPaths)||c.expectedErrorCodes.length===0||c.expectedPaths.length===0) throw new Error('bad case shape '+JSON.stringify(c)); } console.log('JSON parse/shape ok', files.length, 'cases='+manifest.cases.length);"

tests_run.result: M2 fixture validation passed: districts=30 settlements=10 regionalSeasonalCurves=4 routes=42 mapGeometries=40 manifestHash=9ab72b0b.

tests_run.command: node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module -e "import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { compileContentPackV0OrThrow } from './apps/content-tools/src/index.ts'; const source=JSON.parse(await readFile('content-source/m2-fixtures/prototype-world-30-districts.json','utf8')); const first=compileContentPackV0OrThrow(source); const second=compileContentPackV0OrThrow(structuredClone(source)); if (first.kind!=='runtime-m2-world-content-pack-v0'||second.kind!=='runtime-m2-world-content-pack-v0') throw new Error('expected M2 packs'); const ok=first.manifest.manifestHash===second.manifest.manifestHash&&JSON.stringify(first.districts.map(d=>d.sourceId))===JSON.stringify(second.districts.map(d=>d.sourceId))&&JSON.stringify(first.routes.map(r=>r.sourceId))===JSON.stringify(second.routes.map(r=>r.sourceId)); console.log(JSON.stringify({manifestHash:first.manifest.manifestHash,sameHash:first.manifest.manifestHash===second.manifest.manifestHash,sameDistrictOrder:JSON.stringify(first.districts.map(d=>d.sourceId))===JSON.stringify(second.districts.map(d=>d.sourceId)),sameRouteOrder:JSON.stringify(first.routes.map(r=>r.sourceId))===JSON.stringify(second.routes.map(r=>r.sourceId))})); if(!ok) process.exitCode=1;"
tests_run.result: Repeated M2 compile deterministic: manifestHash=9ab72b0b, sameHash=true, sameDistrictOrder=true, sameRouteOrder=true.

tests_run.result: No output; tracked forbidden-path diff is empty.

Final status shows modified apps/content-tools/src/index.ts, packages/content-schema/src/index.ts, tests/content-schema-graph-source.test.ts, tests/content-tools-compiler.test.ts; untracked validation-only bad fixture manifest and writer handoff; plus pre-existing coordination state/route changes.

decisions: Kept the change inside content schema/tools, tests, and M2 validation fixture metadata; no sim-core, UI, Electron, historical content, save, scheduler, RNG, or protocol package was modified.
Used structured compile/schema failures with stable codes and paths: invalid-schema, bad-reference, duplicate-id, invalid-geometry, isolated-district, and existing route/seasonal codes.
M2 bad fixture material is a manifest of validation-only negative cases, explicitly FICTIONAL/LOW and tied to M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 so it cannot be mistaken for production or historical content.
M2 polygon/anchor checks use integer coordinate arithmetic and deterministic route graph traversal with explicit text sorting.
risks: The compiler now treats every M2 district route graph disconnection as invalid because the M2 source schema has no explicit isolated-district marker. This matches current acceptance but should be revisited if a later task designs intentional islands.
Pre-existing coordination-state changes and route message remain in the workspace; they were not created or reverted by this implementation.
requested_action: Review M2-CONTENT-GUARDS-001 for acceptance. Validate the new compiler guards, validation-only fixture manifest, deterministic M2 fixture hash, and forbidden-path boundary.
